channel.title: Wenjie Xu's Blog
channel.description: Sharing academic research, tutorials, and life reflections

item.title: Building a Personal Blog with Astro: A Complete Guide
item.description: Learn how to create a modern, fast, and SEO-friendly personal blog using Astro, featuring MDX support, dark mode, and internationalization.
item.author: 徐文杰

item.title: Welcome to My Academic Blog
item.description: This is my first blog post, introducing the purpose of this blog and my research directions.
item.author: 徐文杰
